medical_history.chief_complaint: Elevated CA 19-9 serum level (3049 U/mL) detected during follow-up examination 11 years after breast cancer surgery
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: No symptoms (eg, pain or fever) were reported. Subsequent staging procedures showed high-grade, right-sided hydronephrosis. A renal calculus was found occluding the right pyeloureteral junction. Renal radionuclide imaging showed complete loss of function of the right kidney.

physical_examination.specialty_examination: Ultrasound showed massive hydronephrosis of the right kidney. Excretory urography showed occlusion of the right pyeloureteral junction by a renal calculus and renal duplication on the left side. Abdominal CT scan showed a large cystic renal mass.
